    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    S

    save() - Method in class model.Leaderboard
    Saves the leaderboard file
    save() - Method in class model.Profile
    Saves the current modification of the profile to the data file
    save(Object, String) - Static method in class model.util.DataManager
    Static class to save the file
    ScoreManager - Class in model
    ScoreManager is used mostly to get information of how many points it gain (separated in different types: passes for the entities, passes for ControlRoom, time and total)
    ScoreManager(Play) - Constructor for class model.ScoreManager
    Constructor of ScoreManager that set Play to read the points at the end of the game
    SCREAM - Static variable in class view.util.AudioManager
     
    SCREEN_COLOR_BACKGROUND - Static variable in class view.util.FactoryComponents
     
    setAvatar(String) - Method in class model.Profile
     
    setAvatarImg(BufferedImage) - Method in class view.panel.ProfilePanel
     
    setChosen(boolean) - Method in class model.Profile
     
    setInteraction(boolean) - Method in class model.entity.detectable.entities.Furniture
     
    setItem(int) - Method in class model.entity.detectable.entities.Furniture
     
    setJ(boolean) - Method in class model.entity.Player
    Set jump input state
    setL(boolean) - Method in class model.entity.Player
    Set left input state
    setLiftMoving(boolean) - Method in class model.entity.Player
     
    setNickname(String) - Method in class model.Profile
     
    setPlay(Play) - Method in class view.panel.PlayPanel
    Sets the Play to get information from and set the start phase
    setPlayState(Play.PlayState) - Method in class model.Play
    Set PlayState (in case is WIN, LOST or FORCESTOP it stops the game)
    setR(boolean) - Method in class model.entity.Player
    Set right input state
    setRunningSound(boolean) - Method in class view.util.AudioManager
    Enable/Disable sounds, if switch to ON gives a random audio to test
    setRunningTrack(boolean) - Method in class view.util.AudioManager
     
    SETTINGS - Enum constant in enum class view.Navigator.ScreenStates
     
    SettingsPanel - Class in view.panel
    Panel used to get access to the settings (mute/play the sounds and the soundtrack of the menu, and resetting the leaderboard)
    SettingsPanel(Navigator) - Constructor for class view.panel.SettingsPanel
    SettingsPanel constructor that initialize and add the components
    setVictory() - Method in class view.panel.PlayPanel
    Once finally reaching the control room with the complete passwords, starts the victory sequence.
    SHOCK - Static variable in class view.util.AudioManager
     
    showDebugStuff(Play, Graphics2D) - Static method in class view.util.play.RenderPlay
    Debug information render
    showResetNotif(boolean) - Method in class view.panel.TerminalPanel
    Show the result of the action after pressing the button liftReset
    showSleepNotif(boolean) - Method in class view.panel.TerminalPanel
    Show the result of the action after pressing the button robotSleep
    SINK - Enum constant in enum class model.entity.detectable.entities.Furniture.FurnitureTypes
     
    sleepAll() - Method in class model.entity.enemy.EnemyManager
    Disable all enemies
    SOFA - Enum constant in enum class model.entity.detectable.entities.Furniture.FurnitureTypes
     
    solidCheckH(float, float, float, int[][]) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Horizontal solid check
    solidCheckV(float, float, float, int[][]) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Vertical solid check
    SPEAKER - Enum constant in enum class model.entity.detectable.entities.Furniture.FurnitureTypes
     
    SpritesCollection - Class in view.util
    Main class that is used to save all the sprites for the game
    start(Play) - Method in class model.Game
    Start a game with the given Play
    startTrack() - Method in class view.util.AudioManager
    Start the main track in the menu
    STEPL - Static variable in class view.util.AudioManager
     
    STEPR - Static variable in class view.util.AudioManager
     
    STEREO - Enum constant in enum class model.entity.detectable.entities.Furniture.FurnitureTypes
     
    stopAllSingularsSounds() - Method in class view.util.AudioManager
    Stops all the singular sounds in the collection
    stopSingularSound(String) - Method in class view.util.AudioManager
    Stops the singular audio given if is running
    stopTrack() - Method in class view.util.AudioManager
    Stop the main track in the menu
